seoTitle: Monarto vs Monash — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Monarto and Monash. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Monarto and Monash.
heading: Monarto vs Monash — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Monarto, South Australia and Monash, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Monarto has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Monash (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Monarto or Monash safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Monarto has a flood risk score of 38/100, while Monash scores 38/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Monarto scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Monash scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Monarto or Monash?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Monarto has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.52% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
